breaking.title: 'Will be forced to militarily complete the job': Trump warns Iran after US strikes over 2nd ceasefire breach
breaking.summary: The US launched fresh strikes on Iran after accusing Tehran of violating a ceasefire for a second consecutive day by attacking a commercial oil tanker near the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US retaliation for a drone attack on another vessel. Iran has warned of a "practical response" to the US actions, escalating regional tensions despite ongoing diplomatic efforts.

breaking.title: 6.1 magnitude earthquake off northeastern coastline rattles Japan; no tsunami warning issued
breaking.summary: No tsunami warning was issued, and there were no immediate reports of damage or casualties. But the recent spate of quakes coming during typhoon season has set off worries about mudslides

breaking.title: Six terrorists killed, one captured after Rangers’ base attack in Pakistan’s Karachi
breaking.summary: Four soldiers dead; attack claimed by Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, a militant faction of the TTP that has largely operated in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province bordering Afghanistan

breaking.title: US launches strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
breaking.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain.

breaking.title: West Asia war highlights: U.S. conducts further strikes against 'multiple targets' in Iran
breaking.summary: Lebanon's President hopes U.S. will press Israel to withdraw from southern areas

breaking.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
breaking.summary: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

breaking.title: Venezuela jolted again: 5.6-magnitude earthquake strikes Aragua amid rescue efforts
breaking.summary: Venezuela is grappling with a fresh 5.6 magnitude earthquake, compounding the devastation from earlier twin quakes that claimed over 1,430 lives. Rescue efforts are ongoing amidst widespread destruction, with thousands injured and homeless. International aid is arriving as authorities work to restore power and address critical shortages in the hardest-hit areas, while the UN estimates significant economic losses.

breaking.title: Chennai police shoot at murder suspect, arrest seven others after youth dies in assault at Nolambur
breaking.summary: The accused Rupesh, 23, was shot in the knee by the police after he allegedly attacked them
